meta.title: SpaceX SES 10 Press Confrence Full 4k Horizontal
meta.description:
Sorry for the poor quality, this was meant to be a reference and not a stand alone video. It's just an iPhone mounted on my mirrorless camera (my actual job), so audio and video is not fantastic but it's better than nothing. 

SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, SpaceX Communications Director John Taylor, and SES CTO Martin Halliwell talk in great detail about the highly successful SES-10 mission, the future of SpaceX and the future of rocket reusability. 

Make sure and subscribe here and follow on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut
